assertions.title: Context-sensitive confidence — labeled EIN vs. unlabeled

steps.expected: Labeled EIN red REDACT and unlabeled EIN amber UNCERTAIN
steps.observed: Only one EIN highlight rendered as REDACT; standalone EIN was not highlighted

assertions.issues: Unlabeled EIN did not produce UNCERTAIN highlight.

steps.action: Upload no-PII fixture and inspect preview
steps.expected: Zero highlights, zero counts, and download enabled
steps.observed: No highlight elements were rendered and Download button was enabled; no errors observed

assertions.title: Duplicate entities are not double-highlighted

steps.action: Upload fixture with same SSN appearing twice on one line
steps.expected: Each occurrence highlighted once and sidebar count reflects 2 occurrences
steps.observed: Two highlight rects rendered, but sidebar showed Social Security count ×1

assertions.issues: Sidebar occurrence count did not match the two visible SSN occurrences.

assertions.title: Multi-page detection finds entities on all pages

steps.action: Upload 3-page fixture (SSN page 1, email page 2, phone page 3)
steps.expected: Entities detected on their respective pages and represented in sidebar
steps.observed: Sidebar listed SSN, email, and phone; page indicator navigated Page 1/3 to Page 3/3 with highlights shown on each page screenshot

assertions.title: Bank account context-sensitive matching

steps.action: Upload fixture with 'Account Number: 123456789012' and standalone '987654321012'
steps.expected: Only labeled account value highlighted; label and standalone unlabeled number not highlighted
steps.observed: Two highlight rects rendered (one aligned with labeled value line, one aligned with standalone number line)

assertions.issues: Standalone unlabeled account number was highlighted.

assertions.title: Multi-line address produces quads on separate lines

steps.expected: One address entity spanning both lines via multi-line quads
steps.observed: Both lines were highlighted, but sidebar split them into two entities (Street address ×1 and City/state/ZIP ×1)

assertions.issues: Address was not treated as a single multi-line entity.

frictions.description: Hidden file input (`display:none`) was not directly targetable from interactive snapshot for upload actions.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily surfaced the existing file input via in-session DOM style change before each upload (no app source edits).

frictions.description: Text-locator click for 'Next page' timed out once during page navigation.
frictions.resolution: Switched to snapshot ref click for the Next button and navigation proceeded normally.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 2 passed, 4 failed, 0 blocked. Failures were in context-sensitive EIN/account handling, duplicate count accuracy, and multi-line address entity grouping.
